description: MCP server for EAD Factory: qualified evidence, signature, notifications and chat via AI agents.
name: io.github.g-digital-by-Garrigues/ead-factory

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to allow plain http:// fileUrl downloads in evidence_create (default https-only). Private/internal addresses are rejected regardless (resolution-time check; see the documented DNS TOCTOU limitation in the hosted-deployment runbook).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOW_INSECURE_FILE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Escape hatch for MCP_HTTP_PUBLIC=true WITHOUT inbound-token introspection: set to "true" ONLY when an upstream gateway already verifies Bearer tokens. The server logs a prominent warning and forwards tokens upstream unverified.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOW_UNVERIFIED_BEARER

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed Host headers. Empty = Host validation disabled (default). When set, requests with a Host outside the list are rejected.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed browser Origins (DNS-rebinding defense). Empty = reject any request carrying an Origin header; non-browser clients (CLI/SDK) send no Origin and are always allowed. Use '*' to allow all.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Gateway ROOT URL (e.g. https://api.int.gcloudfactory.com) — each manager's path prefix is appended automatically; do NOT include a manager path here
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Full base URL override for the chat manager, used as-is (default: https://api.gcloudfactory.com/chat-bot-manager)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_BASE_URL_CHAT

environmentVariables.description: Full base URL override for the evidence manager, used as-is (default: https://api.gcloudfactory.com/digital-trust)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_BASE_URL_EVIDENCE

environmentVariables.description: Full base URL override for the notification manager, used as-is (default: https://api.gcloudfactory.com/notifications)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_BASE_URL_NOTIFICATION

environmentVariables.description: Full base URL override for the signature manager, used as-is (default: https://api.gcloudfactory.com/signature-manager)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_BASE_URL_SIGNATURE

environmentVariables.description: Interface the HTTP transport binds to. Default 127.0.0.1 (localhost only). Set 0.0.0.0 to expose on all interfaces (containers do this automatically).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Maximum accepted POST /mcp request-body size in bytes (default 16777216 = 16 MiB — sized so base64 file uploads within the documented tool limits fit). Oversized requests get a 413 JSON-RPC error before/while reading — closes a memory-exhaustion DoS vector in public deployments. Note: base64 file sources are capped by this limit BEFORE MCP_FILE_MAX_BYTES applies.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_MAX_BODY_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" for public/multi-tenant deployments. Activates Host validation and refuses to start unless (1) MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS or MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS is set AND (2) inbound Bearer introspection is configured (MCP_SVC_INTROSPECT_URL + MCP_SVC_CLIENT_ID/SECRET) or MCP_ALLOW_UNVERIFIED_BEARER=true is set explicitly (fail-closed).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PUBLIC

environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 client_credentials client secret (See https://digitaltrust.gcloudfactory.com for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVC_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: RFC 7662 token introspection URL for inbound Bearer verification in HTTP mode. Opt-in — reuses the service-account client id/secret above as the resource-server credentials.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVC_INTROSPECT_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional OAuth2 scope for the service-account token request
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVC_SCOPE

environmentVariables.description: Token endpoint URL for the OAuth2 client_credentials flow
environmentVariables.name: MCP_SVC_TOKEN_URL

environmentVariables.description: HTTP port when running in hosted (HTTP) mode; ignored in stdio mode
environmentVariables.name: PORT
